 Customs Invoice

Place & Date: Helsinki 3. Mar. 2021


Shipper: Anastasiya Chernenko
 University of Helsinki
 Research Program in Systems Oncology
 Haartmaninkatu 8, Biomedicum Helsinki
 00290 Helsinki
 Finland
 Telephone: +358505763950


Consignee: Daniel Campton
 RareCyte, Inc.
 2601 Fourth Ave, Suite 500
 Seattle, WA 98121, USA


Telephone: +1 855 727 3298


Contents: Exempt human tissue paraffin sections on glass slides. Non-
infectious, non-contagious, non-hazardous, non-toxic.


Quantity: 10 pcs


All substances are for laboratory testing only in research
collaboration.

Shipment has no commercial value. Value for customs purposes only: 5
Euros.

I declare all information in this invoice to be true and correct.


Sincerely,


____________________________________
Anastasiya Chernenko, Laboratory Coordinator
University of Helsinki, Haartmaninkatu 8,
Biomedicum ,room B317a, 00290 Helsinki, FINLAND
